definition: solid three-dimensional geometric shape, which can be easily generated using parameters without applying special features, such as extruding or revolving

definition_ml.en: solid three-dimensional geometric shape, which can be easily generated using parameters without applying special features, such as extruding or revolving

note: Constructive solid geometry primitives can be used as an operands of a Boolean set operation to generate more a complex shape as a result of the operation.

note_ml.en: Constructive solid geometry primitives can be used as an operands of a Boolean set operation to generate more a complex shape as a result of the operation.
